chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.S-03 of 2021. _________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE _________________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection. 02. For orders on M.A.No.98/2021 (417 Cr.PC). 03. For hearing of main case. 14.02.2022 Mr. Shakeel Ahmed Ansari, Advocate for the appellant. = * = * = * = * = * = Heard. The private respondents were acquitted by learned 6th Judicial Magistrate, Shikarpur, vide judgment dated 10.11.2020, it is impugned by the appellant before this Court by preferring the instant criminal acquittal appeal; it is time barred by 25 days. No application for condoning such a long delay in preferring the instant criminal acquittal appeal is filed. Consequently, the instant criminal acquittal appeal is dismissed being barred by time, together with listed application. JUDG
